info.title: Financial Datasets API — Macro Interest Rates
info.description: Central bank interest rate data (historical series + real-time snapshot), proxied through AIsa.

x-doc.desc_en: The current rate record for the requested bank. Returned as a list for shape consistency with the historical endpoint, typically holding the single latest observation.
x-doc.title_zh: 所查央行的当前利率记录。为与历史接口保持结构一致而以列表返回,通常只含最新一条观测。

bank.description: The symbol of the central bank.

x-doc.desc_en: Code of the central bank this record belongs to, matching the `bank` you queried.
x-doc.title_zh: 本条记录所属央行的代码,与查询的 `bank` 一致。

name.description: The name of the central bank.

x-doc.desc_en: Full human-readable name of the central bank.

rate.description: The interest rate of the central bank.

x-doc.desc_en:
The bank's policy interest rate currently in effect.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明利率单位(百分数还是小数,如 5.25 还是 0.0525),待研发确认。]
x-doc.title_zh:
该央行当前生效的政策利率。
[⚠️批注:源码未声明利率单位(百分数还是小数,如 5.25 还是 0.0525),待研发确认。]

date.description: The date of the interest rate in YYYY-MM-DD format.

x-doc.desc_en: Date this current rate took effect, in `YYYY-MM-DD`.
x-doc.title_zh: 该当前利率的生效日期,格式 `YYYY-MM-DD`。

NotFoundError.description: The specified resource was not found

PaymentRequiredError.description: The request requires a paid subscription

example.message: This endpoint requires a paid subscription. Please upgrade your plan.

get.description: Historical interest rates for all major central banks in the world.

parameters.name: bank
parameters.description: The bank whose interest rates to return. Use the /macro/interest-rates/banks endpoint to get a list of available banks.

x-doc.desc_en: Identifier of the central bank whose rate history to return, e.g. `FED` or `ECB`. The full list of accepted bank codes is available from the `/macro/interest-rates/banks` endpoint.
x-doc.title_zh: 要查询利率历史的央行标识,如 `FED`、`ECB`。完整的可用央行代码可通过 `/macro/interest-rates/banks` 接口获取。

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The start date of the interest rates to return in YYYY-MM-DD format.

x-doc.desc_en: Lower bound of the date window, in `YYYY-MM-DD`. Records on or after this date are returned. Omit it to start from the earliest available record.
x-doc.title_zh: 日期区间的下界,格式 `YYYY-MM-DD`,返回该日期及之后的记录。留空则从最早的可得记录开始。

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The end date of the interest rates to return in YYYY-MM-DD format.

x-doc.desc_en: Upper bound of the date window, in `YYYY-MM-DD`. Records on or before this date are returned. Omit it to run through the most recent record.
x-doc.title_zh: 日期区间的上界,格式 `YYYY-MM-DD`,返回该日期及之前的记录。留空则一直取到最新记录。

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询央行历史利率 getInterestRatesHistorical
x-doc.desc_en: Return the historical policy interest-rate series for a single central bank, optionally bounded to a date window. This is a read-only time-series query: omit the dates to get the full available history, or set a start and/or end to slice a range. Typical uses are charting rate trends and back-testing rate-sensitive models.
x-doc.description_zh: 返回单个央行的历史政策利率序列,可选地限定日期区间。这是只读的时间序列查询:不传日期则取全部可得历史,或设定起止日期截取某段区间。典型场景为绘制利率走势、回测对利率敏感的模型。
x-doc.resp_section_intro: 成功时返回该央行随时间变化的利率记录列表。

errors.message_zh: 请求参数无效,例如漏传必填的 `bank` 或日期格式非法。
鉴权失败,Bearer API Key 缺失或无效。
该接口需要付费订阅,当前套餐无权访问,需升级套餐。

x-doc.errors_source: spec 已声明 400/401/402/404,错误体为 ErrorResponse(error + message)

get.description: Get the current interest rates from all major central banks in the world.

parameters.name: bank
parameters.description: The central bank code (e.g., FED, ECB, BOJ). Use the /macro/interest-rates/banks endpoint to get a list of available banks.

x-doc.desc_en: Identifier of the central bank whose current rate to return, e.g. `FED`, `ECB`, `BOJ`. The full list of accepted bank codes is available from the `/macro/interest-rates/banks` endpoint.
x-doc.title_zh: 要查询当前利率的央行标识,如 `FED`、`ECB`、`BOJ`。完整的可用央行代码可通过 `/macro/interest-rates/banks` 接口获取。

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询央行实时利率 getInterestRatesSnapshot
x-doc.desc_en: Return the current policy interest rate for a single central bank — the latest point in its rate series, not the full history. Use it when you only need the rate in effect right now, e.g. for a live dashboard or a one-off lookup.
x-doc.description_zh: 返回单个央行当前的政策利率 —— 即其利率序列的最新一点,而非完整历史。当你只需当下生效的利率时使用,例如实时看板或一次性查询。
x-doc.resp_section_intro: 成功时返回该央行当前生效的利率记录。

errors.message_zh: 鉴权失败,Bearer API Key 缺失或无效。
该接口需要付费订阅,当前套餐无权访问,需升级套餐。

x-doc.errors_source: spec 已声明 401/402/404(未声明 400),错误体为 ErrorResponse(error + message)
